Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should sit with her until she calms down...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maiko looks dejected...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 64 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}All I did was ask why they're getting a divorce...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 64 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}They got mad at me and said to stay out of it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 110 0 25 25}So I kept asking, but Dad yelled at me and... then he hit me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 64 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Then Mom said it was my fault for asking so much![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 64 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I don't know if they love me anymore...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 64 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Do they just wish I would disappear?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 64 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}...So that's why they get mad at me all the time. It's 'cause they hate me now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}I wanna know how they really feel about me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 110 2 25 25}If they love me, they'll try to find me, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}It's a secret, okay? Don't tell Mom and Dad I'm running away.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maiko seems to trust me a lot.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're growing closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I have to go now... Let's play again sometime![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Maiko and[n]headed back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
